steps.assistant_text: The 'genuine -O0 frame-packing cap' (90-combo decl/type sweep + full compiler-axis exhaustion, 2026-05-31/06-09) fell in ONE variant to the F2EC register-home interleave: -O0 reserves a 4-byte home slot per register var IN DECLARATION ORDER even when colored to an s-reg. Moving p1/p2 register decls AFTER raw drops their home slots below it, lifting &raw sp+0x40 -> sp+0x48 frame-neutrally. The old sweep only permuted aggregates, never register decls. Also: this unit's expected/.o was a circular self-refreshed baseline (false 100.0 fuzzy) — make verify vs baserom caught it.
